quotes.selection: Throughout heaven and earth, I alone am the honored one.
general: When you die, you'll be alone. Don't expect anyone to mourn you.
Dying to win and risking death to win… are completely different, you know?
Love is the most twisted curse of all.
Sorry, but in terms of ability, I'm on a completely different level.
Infinity lies between you and me… an unbridgeable distance.
This is the power of Limitless and the Six Eyes.

Geto ID to be specified: Suguru… we were supposed to walk this path together.
Megumi ID to be specified: Megumi, don't hold back. You've inherited much more than you realize.

passive.name: Infinity
passive.description: Gojo's cursed technique automatically neutralizes the next basic attack against him. Cannot be bypassed unless the attacker uses special empowered autos with ability on-hit effects. Cooldown scales with level.

effects.bypassCondition: Special empowered autos with on-hit effects

passive.name: Reverse Cursed Technique
passive.description: Gojo passively regenerates additional maximum health every 5 seconds. This passive is temporarily lost for 8 seconds when taking damage from champions, epic monsters, turrets, or hit by enemy abilities/summoner spells. Cooldown refreshes on subsequent damage.

h1.name: Forward Rotation – Blue
h1.description: Gojo launches a growing orb of compressed blue cursed energy in a straight line, granting vision. Enemies in Blue are dragged inward toward the center. Minions and monsters have movement speed set to 0. Enemies at center are executed below 5% (+2.6% per Stardust) max health, excluding epic monsters. Can recast to explode.

pullEffect.description: Continuous pull centered on orb's path

centerExecution.description: Enemies at center executed below threshold

h2.name: Reverse Rotation – Red
h2.description: Gojo fires a red cursed orb in a straight line that repels all minions and small monsters in its path, dealing damage for 3 seconds and granting sight. Can recast to explode with knockup.

h3.name: Imaginary Technique – Purple
h3.description: Gojo releases a massive purple cursed sphere in a line, appearing as a beam due to its trail. Deals massive magic damage to enemies, sight-reveals them for 1.5s, and grants vision of surrounding area.

h4.name: Domain Expansion – Infinite Void
h4.description: Gojo selects a target champion and pulls both into his Domain for 8 seconds. Enemy is paralyzed for 2.5 seconds, unable to move or cast abilities due to overwhelming information. During this time, Gojo can reposition and deal damage freely. All enemies on map become revealed for 5 seconds. Domain ends early if either dies.

gojoAdvantage.effect: Can reposition and deal damage freely while enemy paralyzed

lore:
Satoru Gojo is a legendary jujutsu sorcerer and the most powerful of his generation. Born into the prestigious Gojo clan and possessing both the Limitless technique and the rare Six Eyes, he wields near-absolute control over space itself. With unmatched skill and intellect, he serves as both a mentor and protector of the next generation of sorcerers.

Though often carefree, sarcastic, and flamboyantly confident, Gojo hides a deep commitment to changing the corrupt jujutsu system from within. His overwhelming presence on the battlefield and casual dominance over cursed spirits have made him both feared and revered by allies and enemies alike.

Through the precise manipulation of cursed energy, he creates devastating techniques such as Blue, Red, and Purple, and can deploy a domain expansion that traps his enemy in an infinite loop of overwhelming knowledge and sensation—rendering them helpless. Gojo is not just a sorcerer; he's a force of nature.
